subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Lord! I render thanks unto Thee with a tongue that speaketh Thy praise, and a heart steadfast in Thy Covenant, and a spirit watchful for the fulfillment of Thy promise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب انی اشکرک بلسان ناطق بذکرک و قلب ثابت علی عهدک و روح مترصد لانجاز وعدک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech
